purpose: diagnostic factorial rollout for generated-side conditional-interface localization
composition_contract: fixed-count arm uses remaining-count orderless law; no terminal repair
evaluator_boundary: frozen Stage-D independent evaluator; metrics are conditional diagnostics, not H1a/E/F qualification

decision_rule.arm2_failure_after_arm1_pass: lattice interface is the first unsupported side state
decision_rule.arm3_failure_after_arm2_pass: assignment/composition exposure is the first unsupported side state
